name: Polis
description: Governance cells — M-of-N councils, forward-certified amendments, constitution-as-program, budgeted worker mandates, and KERI pre-rotation identities — as factory-born cells whose StateConstraint programs ARE the enforced state machines.

council.machine: DRAFT -> PROPOSED -> {REJECTED, APPROVED -> EXECUTED}, M-of-N gated
state_constraints: AffineLe(M*flag - Sum approvals <= 0)  // the threshold gate
per-member approval slot: MemberOf({0,1}) + Monotonic + BoundedBy(PROPOSAL_HASH)

amendment.machine: council machine + cooling-period TemporalGate on ENACT (EXECUTED)
state_constraints: pin_term(PROPOSAL_HASH_SLOT, new_constitution_hash)  // which successor it enacts
when_state(EXECUTED, TemporalGate(not_before = enact_not_before))  // the cooling gate

constitution.machine: UNINIT -> ACTIVE -> SUPERSEDED, parameters pinned for life, SUPERSEDED terminal
state_constraints: pin_term(VERSION / COUNCIL_THRESHOLD / AMENDMENT_DELAY / TREASURY_CAP)  // pinned for life

mandate.machine: UNINIT -> ACTIVE -> REVOKED, slice/scope pinned, REVOKED terminal/inert

identity.machine: UNINIT -> ACTIVE -> {ACTIVE, RETIRED}; RETIRED terminal/inert. KERI pre-rotation.
state_constraints: KeyRotationGate(digest=NEXT_KEYS_DIGEST, current=CURRENT_KEYS_COMMIT, last_rotated=LAST_ROTATED_AT, cooling, Blake3)  // preimage exhibit + fresh re-commit + cooling

deos.feature_note: The deos surface (src/deos.rs) is GATED behind the `deos` cargo feature. The pure library (default features) ships factory descriptors + cell programs and pulls dregg-cell ONLY — no app-framework / turn / sdk / axum. Enable with `--features deos`.
deos.build_arrangement: src/deos.rs is NOT a library module. `dregg-sdk` depends on `starbridge-polis` (sdk/src/polis.rs re-exports the pure cell programs), and `dregg-app-framework` depends on `dregg-sdk`, so a normal `polis -> app-framework` dependency edge (even optional) would close the illegal package cycle `app-framework -> sdk -> polis -> app-framework`, which Cargo rejects. Cargo permits such a cycle ONLY across a dev-dependency, so app-framework/turn/sdk are this crate's [dev-dependencies], and src/deos.rs is compiled INTO THE TEST BINARIES via `#[cfg(feature = "deos")] #[path = "../src/deos.rs"] mod deos;` in tests/. The SHIPPED library's normal dependency tree is app-framework-free (verified via `cargo tree -p starbridge-polis --edges normal`); the framework appears ONLY under the dev edge.
deos.mount: register_<family>_deos(ctx, ...) builds + seeds + folds each family's composed DeosApp into the StarbridgeAppContext affordance registry; register_all_deos(ctx, ...) mounts all five in family order (council, amendment, constitution, mandate, identity). DeosApp::mount yields the axum router (manifest + /surface.js + per-cell cap-gated fires). The five families share the context's ONE cipherclerk cell, so a host wanting several live concurrently mounts them on DISTINCT contexts.
deos.rights_ladder: observer (Signature, cap-only read) ⊂ participant (Either, a gated machine-advancing step) ⊂ authority (None/root, the decisive transition).

council.publish: Signature (the proposal cell is a dregg:// sturdyref a council member on another federation reacquires)

affordances.view_council: cap-only, Signature (an OBSERVER reads the machine + approvals)
affordances.approve: GATED (cap∧state), Either — PROPOSED precondition; the fire flips member i's approval slot, executor re-enforcing {0,1} + Monotonic + BoundedBy
affordances.certify: GATED (cap∧state), None/root — PROPOSED precondition; the executor's AffineLe threshold gate arms the flag only with Sum approvals >= M

council.seam: CLOSED + TOOTHED. fire_council_approve commits (a real verified turn); fire_council_unapprove_attempt is REFUSED by the executor's Monotonic(approval_slot). (tests/deos_seam.rs)

affordances.view_amendment: cap-only, Signature (an OBSERVER reads the staged successor + cooling gate)
affordances.ratify: GATED (cap∧state), None/root — APPROVED precondition; the fire steps APPROVED -> EXECUTED, the executor's cooling TemporalGate biting against the executor's block height

amendment.seam: CLOSED + TOOTHED. fire_amendment_ratify commits on an executor past the cooling gate (embedded_executor_at(_, 1000) with enact_not_before 500); a ratify before the cooling height (executor at height 0) is REFUSED by the executor's TemporalGate. (tests/deos_seam.rs)

affordances.view_constitution: cap-only, Signature (an OBSERVER reads the pinned parameters)
affordances.amend: GATED (cap∧state), None/root — ACTIVE precondition; the fire records a nonzero successor + steps ACTIVE -> SUPERSEDED, the executor re-enforcing the pinned params + nonzero-successor-at-supersede

constitution.seam: CLOSED + TOOTHED. fire_constitution_amend commits a named supersede; fire_constitution_anon_supersede_attempt (no successor) is REFUSED by the executor's when_state(SUPERSEDED, successor != 0). (tests/deos_seam.rs)

affordances.view_mandate: cap-only, Signature (an OBSERVER reads the slice + tool scope + state)
affordances.invoke: GATED (cap∧state), Either — ACTIVE precondition; the fire is a self-touch under the pins (ACTIVE -> ACTIVE), the executor re-enforcing slice/scope pins
affordances.revoke: GATED (cap∧state), None/root — ACTIVE precondition; the fire steps ACTIVE -> REVOKED, after which the cell is terminally inert

mandate.seam: CLOSED + TOOTHED. fire_mandate_invoke commits, fire_mandate_revoke commits (then a post-revoke invoke is refused — REVOKED is inert); fire_mandate_overspend_attempt (slice inflation) is REFUSED by the executor's pin_term(SLICE). (tests/deos_seam.rs)

identity.publish: Signature (the identity cell is a dregg:// sturdyref a relying party reacquires across the trust boundary)

affordances.view_identity: cap-only, Signature (an OBSERVER reads the key state + cooling anchor)
affordances.attest: GATED (cap∧state), Either — ACTIVE precondition; a device self-touch that leaves the key registers ALONE (the Immutable disjunct of the gate)
affordances.rotate: GATED (cap∧state), None/root — ACTIVE precondition; the fire exhibits the pre-committed Preimage32 + re-commits forward + stamps the height, the executor's KeyRotationGate verifying the exhibit + cooling

identity.seam: CLOSED + TOOTHED. fire_identity_rotate commits a cooled rotation exhibiting the pre-committed preimage (embedded_executor_at(_, 1000), cooling 50, carrying the WitnessBlob::preimage exhibit); a rotation inside the cooling window (executor at height 0) is REFUSED by the executor's KeyRotationGate. (tests/deos_seam.rs)

manifest_health.source_of_truth: starbridge-apps/polis/src/deos.rs (compiled into the test binaries; see deos.build_arrangement)
tests: tests/reexpress_deos_app.rs — the surface re-expression (per-viewer HTTP projection, web-of-cells publish, /surface.js + /manifest); council/mandate/identity FULL, amendment/constitution build+register+gated
tests/deos_seam.rs — one real fire-path tooth + one happy-path green fire per family (all five fully toothed)
